articles.author: Brad Reed, Jake Johnson
articles.title: Trump aides caught with pants down as Iran war gooses inflation - Asia Times
articles.description: New data from the US Bureau of Labor Statistics showed that inflation soared in March thanks in large part to increased energy costs stemming from
articles.content:
New data from the US Bureau of Labor Statistics showed that inflation soared in March thanks in large part to increased energy costs stemming from President Donald Trumps war with Iran.
According to… [+5892 chars]
